"D:/MCU/Project/plane_remote_control/STM32F103XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=plane_remote_control.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage -lc_nano -u _printf_float
